issues.description: The test execution failed with a TypeError: 'expected string or bytes-like object, got PosixPath'. This prevented the orchestrator from completing the verification cycle.
issues.suggestion: Ensure that any path-related logic in the implementation or tests handles both strings and Path objects, or explicitly casts Path objects to strings before passing them to functions expecting bytes/strings.
